concerns: Step 3 math is wrong: '2/11 vs average 1/9 ≈ 11%' is nonsensical. Actual: total weight 13 across 9 entries, average ~1.44. The weights still satisfy the AC but the rationale text should be corrected.

Step 4 is underspecified: buildCompoundEntries() constructs from hardcoded CompoundModeDef[] that don't reference single entry weights. Plan says 'add weight to CompoundModeDef or compute from constituents' without committing. Computing from constituents requires passing weight info — needs a concrete design choice.

Weighted pool expansion (Step 2b) changes cycling semantics from guaranteed sequential to pool-based where the same mode can appear in consecutive slots. Plan doesn't specify whether the ~1273 lines of existing modeManager tests will be updated or whether the pool will preserve sequential non-repetition within a cycle.
